title: Hedlundia borbasii
intro: Hedlundia borbasii, also known as Hungarian chamomile, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its calming and soothing properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation. The bioactive constituents of Hedlundia borbasii include flavonoids, terpenoids, and sesquiterpenes, including apigenin and luteolin, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat insomnia, restlessness, and digestive issues.
